ProductUse CasesSecurityBenchmarksDocsRoadmapOpen AppDocs Hub

Roadmap

Roadmap and scope boundaries

Roadmap communication distinguishes current beta claims from future exploration topics.

Near-term

Stabilize current beta scope, enforce test gates, and package onboarding for real user feedback loops.

Source: crowkis/crowkis.docs/CROWKIS_USP_AND_FEATURE_POSITIONING.md

Mid-term

Improve benchmark depth, operational workflows, and production confidence in migration and federation controls.

Source: crowkis/crowkis.docs/CROWKIS_MARKET_LEADER_STRATEGY.md

Future ideas (not current promises)

Audio cache, advanced agent checkpointing, and additional intelligent routing paths are listed as later-stage ideas.

Source: crowkis/crowkis.docs/CROWKIS_USP_AND_FEATURE_POSITIONING.md

Crowkis is the intelligent control and cache layer between applications and LLM providers.

Built in Rust. Designed for safe reuse, lower latency, and lower spend.
